entry.title: New: Bill 10, FD1 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
“A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AUTHORIZING THE MAYOR OF THE COUNTY OF MAUI TO ENTER INTO AN INTERGOVERNMENTAL AGREEMENT WITH THE STATE OF HAWAII DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH, BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ADMINISTRATION FOR AN EMERGENCY RESPONSE GRANT” The purpose of this bill is to provide the Behavioral Health Administration the opportunity for training initiatives to build capacity within Maui to deliver mental health services.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
